caption: A man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt is seated in front of a camera in a room with neutral-toned walls. He is positioned to the right of a digital interface showing a trading card break listing. The on-screen text features a header stating "*19X CROWN ROYALE PYT #5 TEAM GIVEAWAY* -- 2021-22 PANINI MOSAIC BASKETBALL HOBBY 1-PACK BREAK #54 *RT*", with a price of "$83.99" and a "SOLD OUT" status. A chat window on the left shows messages from "glowbog27" and "Nightbot", including the text "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/CaseBreaksK9". Below the man, a logo reads "JAEPY CASEBREAKS CASEBREAKS.COM". As the video progresses across the frames, the man remains in a similar seated position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his hands, while the layout of the digital overlay remains constant.
